titleStmt.title: SII 38.427: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 427. (A.R. No. 427 of 1912.) VAḺUVŪR, MAYAVARAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the north wall, central shrine, Vīraṭṭānēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakravarttin Kulōttuṅgachōḷa (III). Year 2: Rishabha, su. 5, Thursday Tiruvōṇam = May 15, 1180 A.D. However the paksha is ba. 5.

summary.p: Begins with the meykīrtti, of the king Puyal-vāyttu.

Records that a lady Poṉṉulāveḷi Ādittaḻvi, (a resident) of Mōḍappākkam in Surattūr-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgachōḷa-vaḷanāḍu, in Puliyūr-kōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam deposited 100 kāśu for burning a perpetual lamp to the (god) Tiruvīraṭṭānam-uḍaiyān of Vaḻukūr, a brahmadēyam in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu, in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. It is also stated that the temple officials, dēvaṟkanmikaḷ, (temple servants), kōyiṟ-kaṇakku (temple accountant) śrīmāhēśvarakkaṇkāṇi-śeyvārkaḷ (supervisory officials) and śrīkāriyam-śeyvārkaḷ (temple manager) agreed to measure out one uḻakku of oil daily to the temple treasury out of the interest of 3(1/2) kāśu accrued every month. They also agreed to set up an iron-lamp stand weighing 85 palam and 3 sāṇ in length for the said purpose.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . puyalvāyttu vaḷamperukap poyyātaṉāṉ maṟaiyiṉ ceyalvāytta tirumakaḷun
cayamakaḷuñ ciṟantuvāḻi veṇmati poṟkuṭai viḷaṅkavel ventaraṭi vaṇaṅka maṇmaṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa maṉu [ ni
ti taḻ] Aittoṅka cakkaramuñceṅkolun tikkaṉaittuñ ceṅ naṭātta kaṟpakālam puviparakka munta muṭivu
ṉaintu cempon virasiṁhāsaṉattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakesaripaṉma]
rāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravaṟtikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu ṛṣabhanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣa
ttu pañcamiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaḻuntūr
nāṭṭu brahmadeyam vaḻukūruṭaiyār tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyāṟku jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup puliyūrkko
ṭṭamāna kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭu curattūrnāṭṭu moṭappākka moṭapākkiḻāṉ Āṉa
poṉṉulā veḷi Ātittāḻvi Innāyaṉāṟku Iṟṟaināḷāl vaitta tirununtāviḷakku O
ṉṟukku Iṟṟai nāḷāl śrīpaṇṭārattu Oṭukkiṉa kācu 100 Ikkācu nūṟum Oṭukku koṇṭu Ikkācukku I
nnāḷ mutal māsam Oṉṟukku muṉṟeyaraik kāṟkācāka vanta policai polivatākavum Ippo
licaikku celavāka nāḷoṉṟukku Eṇṇai Uḻakkāka vanta Eṇṇai śrī paṇṭāratte viṭṭu Ikko
yiṟ tevarkanmikaḷuṅ koyiṟkaṇakkarum śrī māheśvarak kaṇkāṇiceyvārkaḷum śrī kāriyañceyvārka
ḷume cantirātittavaṟ celuttakkaṭavomākavum Ittiruviḷakku vaittu Erikka Iṭṭa muccāṇuyarattu Uṭkaru
Irumpum Uṭpaṭa Eṭai Eṇpattaimpalattiṉāl tarākkutti viḷakku Oṉṟum Oṭukkuk koṇṭu Ippaṭi
cammatittu kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom Ivvaṉaivom .
Digital edition of SII 38.427 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
